English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Helen Finch Smith papers
Smith, Helen Finch, 1899-1977.
3777
7.2 cubic feet. 7.2 cubic feet.
[ca.1788]-1974. Manuscripts. Manuscript, typed, mimeographed and printed material derived from family and genealogical research; local, county, court, church and cemetery records; and printed local and family history, primarily in southern and central New York State and nearby Pennsylvania counties. Includes research notes and correspondence concerning Cayuga, Schuyler, Tompkins, Madison, Chenango, Tioga and Chemung Counties, New York. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 8 ======= 8 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2071418
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
October 1994
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2008
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Helen Finch Smith was a genealogist.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Manuscript, typed, mimeographed and printed material derived from family and genealogical research; local, county, court, church and cemetery records; and printed local and family history, primarily in southern and central New York State and nearby Pennsylvania counties. Includes research notes and correspondence concerning Cayuga, Schuyler, Tompkins, Madison, Chenango, Tioga and Chemung Counties, New York.
Cite As:
Helen Finch Smith papers, #3777. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Genealogies. Tompkins County (N.Y.) Tioga County (N.Y.) Schuyler County (N.Y.) Madison County (N.Y.) Chemung County (N.Y.) Chenango County (N.Y.) Cayuga County (N.Y.) Pennsylvania. Genealogists. Sepulchral monuments. Genealogy.
